professional_standard_verdict.reason: The batch is visually strong and professionally usable in most respects, but Knoll's carried closure test remains unmet at the authoritative exact-96px scale. The receipt survives, but the pear-handled office stamp and its contact action do not read independently of the labeled master. A critical dimension cannot be averaged against the other eleven units.

immutable_cut_verification.method: Independently recomputed SHA-256 immediately before verdict.

contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Twelve distinct master PNGs are present, hash-matched, and visible on the contact and master-comparison boards.

contract_coverage.criterion: Three materially distinct rough silhouette options per unit
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: All twelve rough triptychs contain three identifiable alternatives. Several humanoid sets are conservative, but each changes pose or dominant mass sufficiently for the contract floor.

contract_coverage.criterion: Explicit art-primary and separated secondary trait channels
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The calibration bible and manifest assign channels for all 22 traits, and masters visibly preserve the dominant channel without a competing second prop.

contract_coverage.criterion: All 22 traits and all represented combat roles covered
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The manifest covers 22 unique traits across Tank, Mage, Assassin, Marksman, Support, and Brawler.

contract_coverage.criterion: Gameplay role and recognizable hook preserved
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Tank mass, mage control lines, assassin forward loading, marksman ranged axes, support implements, and Kett's striking fist remain visible.

contract_coverage.criterion: Peak-condition age/body policy and deliberate-horror exception
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Humanoids read as combat-capable adults; Nyxa reads as a batlike temporal predator before an ordinary elderly woman.

contract_coverage.criterion: Applicable women read adult, lean, toned, feminine, attractive, and combat-capable
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Cashmere, Quillith, and Luna visibly meet the applicable lane without juvenile, bulky, or ordinary-frailty coding.

contract_coverage.criterion: Armor and protection follow role/design logic
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Frontline survivability is anatomical or industrial; non-frontline women are not forced into generic armor.

contract_coverage.criterion: Psychology visible in face and posture
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Same-master face crops show differentiated shame, appraisal, ingratiation, vacancy, control, anticipated relief, split surveillance, panic, and cold certainty.

contract_coverage.criterion: Villainous or horrific without universal generic anger
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The face and master boards visibly distribute emotional families; Kett and Malachor use directed grievance/panic while other units use control, invitation, predation, shame, or dissociation.

contract_coverage.criterion: One dominant prop or anatomical idea
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Each master has one controlling mass or implement: yoke, clamp, ledger, siphon hand, spine-bow, blade ring, stamp/receipt, slate, fist, ligament, flesh clamp, or rifle.

Costs appear as calcification, fused shell, tax-script, mismatched tissue, temporal aging, erased face, eyelid scars, exposed nerves, bone embossing, split eyes, debtor tissue/clock, and citation scars.

contract_coverage.criterion: No anatomy, hand, or prop-integration failure
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Full-resolution masters show traceable limbs and mechanically coherent dominant props/anatomies; no decisive integration break was observed.

contract_coverage.criterion: No roster convergence into one body, costume, face, palette, prop, or demon family
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Role-grouped master and 96px boards preserve distinct body plans, silhouettes, facial structures, and dominant ideas.

contract_coverage.criterion: Dry grounded tactical-gothic fidelity against approved Vellum
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The batch remains matte, worn, detailed, and non-gacha. It reaches the professional floor, although Vellum retains stronger material separation and authored graphic hierarchy.
Eleven units retain their dominant read. Knoll's pale receipt survives, but the stamp head, pear handle, and contact action collapse into the hand cluster at exact 96px.

contract_coverage.criterion: All four carried closure tests closed
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Veyra, Kett, and Malachor close; Knoll remains open at exact 96px.
All 61 revalidated files match their frozen hashes; the visual-harness packet has no missing evidence.

Veyra.observed_evidence: Selected C rough is a forward-running open crescent. The master pitches right with two braced legs and several pointed jaw plates converging on one target. The exact derivative preserves an open mouth and active gait.
Veyra.comparative_evidence: Unlike a passive egg or shield, the opening remains lateral and target-directed on all three required surfaces.
Veyra.closure_test: Master, selected C rough, and exact 96px must read as an actively lunging open sideways living clamp before egg, armadillo, shell, or passive shield.

Knoll.observed_evidence: Selected B rough and master clearly show a small pear-handled stamp touching one long pale flexible receipt. In exact knoll_96px.png, the pale receipt survives but the stamp head, pear handle, and contact point merge into the hand cluster.
Knoll.comparative_evidence: The full master establishes an office-stamping action; the exact derivative reduces it to a goblin manipulating pale paper. It does not misread as a hammer or anvil, but it also does not positively read as a stamp.
Knoll.closure_test: Master, selected B rough, and exact 96px must independently read as a small pear-handled office stamp visibly contacting one long pale flexible receipt, with no hammer, anvil, table, block, staff, or cane first read.
Knoll.testable_closure_condition: A new same-master exact-96px derivative must preserve a separately legible stamp cap/pear handle and an unambiguous contact point on one continuous pale curling receipt when viewed without labels or the master.

Kett.observed_evidence: The face crop shows narrowed grievance-focused eyes, compressed restraint, and one raised mouth corner approaching involuntary relief. The enormous fist owns the foreground and sight line; the trailing hand remains subordinate.
Kett.comparative_evidence: The expression is not a generic rage snarl or broad grin, and no second prop competes with the fist.
Kett.closure_test: Face must combine grievance and restraint with an involuntary one-corner near-grin or equivalent anticipated relief while preserving the single dominant fist and target line.

Malachor.observed_evidence: The embedded head turns down and toward image-right; both pupils sit along the same lower-right demand vector toward the open clamp. The mouth demands rather than addressing the viewer frontally.
Malachor.comparative_evidence: The target-tracking head and eyes differ visibly from a frontal portrait stare.
Malachor.closure_test: Head, pupils, and demand expression must visibly track the lower-right clamp target rather than stare frontally at the viewer.

findings.claim: Knoll's identity-defining office-stamp action is not independently readable at the required exact-96px scale.
findings.impact: The Trader hook becomes generic paper handling at board scale, so the carried acceptance condition and the critical silhouette/downstream-usability dimension remain below professional.
findings.falsification: Refute with a same-master exact-96px derivative in which blind inspection identifies a small pear-handled office stamp, its visible contact point, and one long flexible receipt without relying on labels, prose, or enlargement.

rejection_case: A demanding character-art director would reject the batch because one of its twelve identity-critical actions still fails at the declared consumption size. Knoll is professionally drawn at master scale, but the production deliverable is explicitly required to survive unchanged at 96px, where the stamp action disappears. Accepting it would convert a precise closure condition into a prose-assisted pass.
excellence_gap: The approved Vellum anchor has stronger graphic value grouping and more deliberate separation of cloth, metal, paper, skin, and wear; several masters rely on uniform dense microtexture and subdued brown-gray rendering.

Some humanoid rough triptychs, especially Quillith's, explore pose variants more than radically different silhouette strategies. This is nonblocking in the preserved lineage but limits design-search authority.
Cashmere, Knoll, Kett, and Sable use highly detailed surface patterning that competes somewhat with their major masses at master scale.
Sable's exact-96 rifle reads, but the extreme footnote-rifle proportion is less dominant than in the selected rough.

Several psychologically specific contradictions are excellent in face crops but become ordinary sternness or predation at full-card distance; future presentation could preserve more facial hierarchy without changing scope.
weak_proof: Matching hashes prove immutable identity, not visual quality.
Visual-harness evidence_failures=0 proves packet completeness; its own quality verdict is unknown.
Labeled boards and adjacent prose prime the intended unit, trait, prop, and psychology reads.
Three-times nearest-neighbor enlargements are diagnostic aids, not substitutes for the exact 96x96 image.
Psychology records cannot rescue expressions or poses that are not visible.
missed_detection_causes: Reviewing Knoll's exact derivative after the master makes the viewer mentally restore the missing stamp.
The bright receipt survives reduction and can create a false sense that the complete office-stamping action also survived.
Board labels explicitly name Trader and the selected design, reducing the difficulty of interpretation.
Automated validation checks dimensions, hashes, lineage, and evidence presence but cannot test first-read prop semantics.
Strong performance across eleven units can invite batch averaging despite the no-averaging rule for critical dimensions.

strongest_counterargument.case: Knoll's master and selected rough unmistakably show the intended office stamp, the exact derivative preserves the goblin and pale receipt, and no forbidden hammer, anvil, table, staff, or cane read survives. The batch otherwise clears the professional floor with strong distinctiveness and psychology.
strongest_counterargument.reason: The carried condition is conjunctive across master, rough, and exact 96px and requires a positive stamp-contact read, not merely absence of forbidden alternatives. The exact derivative does not provide that positive read.

unknowns: No neutral blind-identification panel was supplied for the exact derivatives; direct visual inspection was therefore used.
No downstream character-modeling, animation, or fabrication test was provided, but those outputs are outside this concept-phase contract.
Layered source files and turnarounds were not inspected and are not required by the frozen phase boundary.
No prior or sibling Board report was inspected.
